findings.title: Query not trimmed before routing regex
findings.description: The individual tool handlers (get_epic, get_task, list_tasks) now trim their ID arguments before use, but the routing regex in index.ts tests the raw `query` without trimming. A whitespace-padded task ID like " ABC-1-1 " would fail the regex and be incorrectly routed to get_epic, which would then trim it and fail with a not_found error instead of being correctly routed to get_task.
